title: Graduate School of Health Sciences Activities
content:
Graduate School of Health Sciences Activities

Health Science Graduate School members are focusing on R&D studies. Our university carries out a strategic plan for the Graduate School of Health Sciences, 15 graduate and 9 educational programs, and a project specializing in the field of health sciences for the purpose of "scientific research and production". Our R&D projects are aimed at developing project development projects and projects. It ranks 4th among Üsküdar universities in Turkey in the SCIMAGO index. Among Üsküdar universities, the basic coverage of health sciences is broader than the sciences used in medical education in the field of sciences and scientists in the scientific world. In our university, which is among the first 500 universities in the field of psychiatry, people determined by Health Sciences can visit the worksheets for research developments and information about life.

Please visit

here

for the regular multidisciplinary meeting presentations focused on Health Sciences at our university.
